args.content: Hey Mina and Jae, I can't make the club tonight as I need to focus on tomorrow's exam. But I really want to see you both later for our post-exam gathering so we can be fully present together!

action.reasoning: Advances g1 by smoothing friction before the 21:00 deadline, satisfying my affiliation value. Avoids immediate conflict (g3) without sacrificing long-term closeness, though it defers the harder study task (g2) until morning.
